isolation.surface: pytest CLI / direct local PostgreSQL integration tests
isolation.network: localhost-only; no external network access used
isolation.serialization: single pytest process within this subagent
isolation.engineConstruction: Explicit localhost-only engine inside test/test_deep_upsert.py fixtures; no implicit reflect_models() config used

commandsRun.observation: Collected 21 tests and passed all 21 in 0.18s. Coverage matched the assigned user-api assertions: values_quant insertion with resolved FK labels, values_cat insertion with resolved FK labels, batch insertion of 10 rows with shared FK reuse, natural-key lookup for existing and missing units, human-readable IngestError messages, session commit/rollback behavior, and lookup-table protection across referenced lookup values plus direct row/batch guards against inserting into lookup tables. Pytest emitted 16 SQLAlchemy mapper-overlap warnings, but no assertion failed.

summary: All 7 assigned VAL-API assertions passed through the real pytest CLI surface against localhost:5432/quantdb_test; the targeted run executed 21 tests covering row, batch, get, error, session, and lookup-protection behaviors.
